title: Per-document metadata (sidecar JSON next to each PDF)

id.description: Stable doc id, e.g. L001, I004, M009, IM003, T002. First letter encodes category.

doc_type.description: Free-text type within the category: 'residential_lease', 'commercial_invoice', 'clinical_trial_protocol', 'I-130_application', 'IRS_form_1040', etc.

source_url.description: The exact URL the file was downloaded from. Permanent / archive.org if source is unstable.

source_organization.description: Publishing entity: 'U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development', 'The Atticus Project (CUAD)', 'PubMed Central', etc.

license_verified_at.description: Date a human confirmed the license claim from the source page.

format.description: digital_pdf has a real text layer; scan_high/low are real scans; synthetic_scan is digital rendered at lower DPI + noise (we have ground truth text); image_only_pdf is a born-as-images PDF.

synthetic_scan_params.description: Present only when format == 'synthetic_scan'. Controls reproducibility.

ground_truth_text.description: For format=synthetic_scan or where we manually transcribed: the ground truth text per page (concatenated with form-feed page separators), enabling exact OCR error-rate computation.

ground_truth_fields.description: Structured fields extractable from the doc, used by Step 0c metrics and Step 8 structured-extraction evaluation. Schema varies by category.

used_in_questions.description: Backreferences to question IDs that cite this doc as ground truth.
